subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is meet for that Divine Being through Whose manifestation all things have been moved to proclaim "the Promised One!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت موجودی را لایق و سزاست که بظهورش جمیع اشیا بانی الموعود ناطق و از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
